requirements.summary: Remove unwanted shaking, wobbling, or animation effects from the login page interface to ensure a stable, professional appearance
acceptanceCriteria: The login page displays without any shaking or animation effects
All login UI elements remain stationary and stable during render
The login button and authentication components appear without motion

file_operations.description: Review and remove any CSS classes, inline styles, or animation properties that cause shaking/wobbling effects on the login button. Ensure transition classes are appropriate and don't cause visual instability. Remove any transform, animation, or keyframe-based effects that create unwanted motion.

Review global styles and Tailwind configuration to identify and remove any animation utilities or custom CSS that might be causing shaking effects on authentication-related components. Check for any keyframe animations or transform properties affecting login UI elements.

If the login UI appears on the dashboard during authentication checks, ensure there are no loading states, conditional rendering, or layout shifts that cause visual shaking. Stabilize any authentication-dependent UI rendering to prevent motion effects.
